tasks.label: CTOA: Preflight Mobile Console Env
args: $required = 'CTOA_OWNER_USER','CTOA_OWNER_PASSWORD','CTOA_OPERATOR_USER','CTOA_OPERATOR_PASSWORD','CTOA_MOBILE_TOKEN'; $missing = $required | Where-Object { [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace((Get-Item -Path "Env:$_" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Value) }; if ($missing.Count -gt 0) { Write-Error ('Missing required env vars: ' + ($missing -join ', ')); exit 1 }; Write-Host 'Mobile console env preflight PASS'

tasks.label: CTOA: Validate Pack
tasks.command: echo CTOA AI Toolkit pack is configured

tasks.label: CTOA: Launch Pack
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "python scripts/ops/ctoa_update_gate.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; echo Launching CTOA pack...; if (Test-Path .\agents\ctoa-agents.yaml) { echo Agents OK } else { echo Agents missing; exit 1 }; if (Test-Path .\prompts\braver-library.yaml) { echo Prompts OK } else { echo Prompts missing; exit 1 }; if (Test-Path .\.github\workflows\ctoa-pipeline.yml) { echo CI Workflow OK } else { echo CI Workflow missing; exit 1 }; echo Launch dry-run PASS"

CTOA: Eval Compare Run
tasks.command: python scripts/ops/aggregate_agent_eval.py evals/runs/${input:ctoaEvalRun}/results.azure-activity-baseline.gpt-5.4.jsonl && python scripts/ops/aggregate_agent_eval.py evals/runs/${input:ctoaEvalRun}/results.azure-activity-fact-first.gpt-5.4.jsonl && python scripts/ops/aggregate_agent_eval.py evals/runs/${input:ctoaEvalRun}/results.azure-activity-strict-evidence.gpt-5.4.jsonl && python scripts/ops/compare_eval_summaries.py --json-out evals/runs/${input:ctoaEvalRun}/comparison.gpt-5.4.json evals/runs/${input:ctoaEvalRun}/*.summary.json

tasks.label: CTOA: Docker KPI Estimate Context Delta
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; function Get-DirSize($p){ if(Test-Path $p){ (Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $p -Recurse -File -Force | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum } else { 0 } }; $items=@('runtime','logs','backups','archived','releases'); $rows=@(); $sum=0; foreach($i in $items){ $b=Get-DirSize $i; $sum+=$b; $rows += [pscustomobject]@{ Item=$i; Bytes=$b; MiB=[math]::Round($b/1MB,3) } }; $tasksPath='.vscode/tasks.json'; $tasksBytes= if(Test-Path $tasksPath){ (Get-Item $tasksPath).Length } else { 0 }; $sumTotal=$sum+$tasksBytes; $rows += [pscustomobject]@{ Item='.vscode/tasks.json'; Bytes=$tasksBytes; MiB=[math]::Round($tasksBytes/1MB,3) }; $rows | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Write-Output ('TOTAL_EXCLUDED_BYTES=' + $sumTotal); Write-Output ('TOTAL_EXCLUDED_MiB=' + [math]::Round($sumTotal/1MB,3));
